name: LYMPHOID HYPERPLASIA

demographics.Frequency: normal variant in 13% of BE examinations
demographics.Histo: hyperplastic lymph follicles in lamina propria (Peyer patches) ← probably
demographics.Associated with: splenomegaly, large tonsils, eczematous dermatitis, achlorhydria, pernicious

dominant_finding: mucosa studded with innumerable 1-3-mm small uniform polypoid lesions
discriminating_features: mucosa studded with innumerable 1-3-mm small uniform polypoid lesions

general: mucosa studded with innumerable 1-3-mm small uniform polypoid lesions
